# Config Reference

<!-- This file is generated by `bun run gen-schema`. Do not edit by hand. -->

| Path | Required | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `maintainers` | yes | array<object> |  | Known PreAUR maintainers. |
| `maintainers[]` | yes | object |  | A packager identity. |
| `maintainers[].id` | yes | string |  | Stable maintainer id used by packages. |
| `maintainers[].name` | yes | string |  | Maintainer display name. |
| `maintainers[].email` | yes | string |  | Maintainer email address. |
| `default_maintainer` | no | string |  | Maintainer id used when a package omits maintainer. |
| `git` | no | object | {} | Project repository automation. |
| `git.enabled` | no | boolean | true | Enable project git automation. |
| `git.remote` | no | string | "origin" | Remote used for sync and push. |
| `git.branch` | no | string |  | Branch used for sync and push. Default: current branch. |
| `git.sync` | no | object | {} | Project git startup sync policy. |
| `git.sync.allow_remote_overwrite_local` | no | boolean | false | Reset local state to remote during sync. |
| `git.sync.allowRemoteOverwriteLocal` | no | boolean |  | CamelCase alias for allow_remote_overwrite_local. |
| `git.push` | no | object | {} | Project git push policy. |
| `git.push.force` | no | boolean | false | Use git push --force after builds. |
| `config` | no | object |  | Runtime behavior settings. |
| `config.pkgbuildParser` | no | native \| makepkg |  | PKGBUILD parser implementation. |
| `config.trustedAurGitPrefixes` | no | array<string> |  | Git URL prefixes treated as AUR package sources. |
| `config.trustedAurGitPrefixes[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `config.chrootPacman` | no | object |  | Pacman configuration added to devtools chroots. |
| `config.chrootPacman.include` | no | array<string> |  | Host files included into generated pacman.conf. |
| `config.chrootPacman.include[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `config.chrootPacman.lines` | no | array<string> |  | Raw pacman.conf lines appended globally. |
| `config.chrootPacman.lines[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `config.chrootPacman.repositories` | no | array<object> |  | Custom chroot pacman repositories. |
| `config.chrootPacman.repositories[]` | yes | object |  | A custom pacman repository for chroot builds. |
| `config.chrootPacman.repositories[].name` | yes | string |  | Pacman repository name. |
| `config.chrootPacman.repositories[].siglevel` | no | string \| array<string> |  | Repository SigLevel line. |
| `config.chrootPacman.repositories[].siglevel[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `config.chrootPacman.repositories[].include` | no | array<string> |  | Host files included into this repository block. |
| `config.chrootPacman.repositories[].include[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `config.chrootPacman.repositories[].lines` | no | array<string> |  | Raw pacman.conf lines appended to this repository block. |
| `config.chrootPacman.repositories[].lines[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `resources` | no | object | {} | Build and check concurrency settings. |
| `resources.cpu` | no | string |  | CPU allocation passed to builders. |
| `resources.parallel` | no | integer | 2 | Concurrent package builds. |
| `resources.updateCheckCocurrent` | no | integer | 1 | Concurrent version checks. |
| `repo` | no | object |  | Local pacman repository settings. |
| `repo.name` | yes | string |  | Local pacman repository name. |
| `packages` | yes | array<object> |  | Packages managed by PreAUR. |
| `packages[]` | yes | object |  | A package build entry. |
| `packages[].pkgname` | yes | string |  | Local package name. |
| `packages[].maintainer` | no | string |  | Maintainer id. Defaults to default_maintainer. |
| `packages[].allow_orphan_package_build` | no | boolean |  | Allow building an orphan AUR package. |
| `packages[].aur_pkgname` | no | string |  | AUR package name when it differs from pkgname. |
| `packages[].git` | no | string |  | Package PKGBUILD git URL override. |
| `packages[].checker` | no | object |  | Upstream version checker. |
| `packages[].checker.strip_version` | no | boolean |  | Strip common version prefixes before comparison. |
| `packages[].checker.normalize` | no | boolean |  | Normalize upstream version text. |
| `packages[].checker.template` | no | string |  | Template mapping upstream version text to PKGBUILD variables. |
| `packages[].checker.type` | yes | "github" |  | Use GitHub release data. |
| `packages[].checker.repo` | yes | string |  | GitHub repository as owner/name. |
| `packages[].checker.use` | no | string |  | Release selector such as release or prerelease. |
| `packages[].checker.prefix` | no | string |  | Version tag prefix to strip. |
| `packages[].checker.suffix` | no | string |  | Version tag suffix to strip. |
| `packages[].checker.type` | yes | "deb" |  | Use a Debian Packages index. |
| `packages[].checker.url` | yes | string |  | Repository base URL. |
| `packages[].checker.pkg` | yes | string |  | Debian package name. |
| `packages[].checker.dist` | yes | string |  | Debian distribution name. |
| `packages[].checker.component` | yes | string |  | Debian repository component. |
| `packages[].checker.arch` | no | string |  | Debian architecture. |
| `packages[].checker.type` | yes | "rpm" |  | Use an RPM repository. |
| `packages[].checker.pkg` | yes | string |  | RPM package name. |
| `packages[].builder` | no | string |  | Build command such as extra-x86_64-build. |
| `packages[].push` | no | boolean |  | Push package PKGBUILD changes to AUR on success. |
| `packages[].dummy_packages` | no | array<object> |  | Dummy packages installed before build. |
| `packages[].dummy_packages[]` | yes | object |  | A generated dummy dependency package. |
| `packages[].dummy_packages[].dummy` | yes | string |  | Dummy package name. |
| `packages[].dummy_packages[].epoch` | no | string \| number |  | Dummy package epoch. |
| `packages[].dummy_packages[].pkgver` | no | string \| number |  | Dummy package version. |
| `packages[].dummy_packages[].pkgrel` | no | string \| number |  | Dummy package release. |
| `packages[].dummy_packages[].files` | no | array<string> |  | Files provided by the dummy package. |
| `packages[].dummy_packages[].files[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `packages[].repo_packages` | no | array<string> |  | Local repo packages required before this build. |
| `packages[].repo_packages[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `packages[].pre-build-packages` | no | array<string> |  | Packages installed in chroot before build. |
| `packages[].pre-build-packages[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `packages[].pre-build-scripts` | no | array<string> |  | Root scripts run in chroot before build. |
| `packages[].pre-build-scripts[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `packages[].pre_build_packages` | no | array<string> |  | Alias for pre-build-packages. |
| `packages[].pre_build_packages[]` | yes | string |  |  |
| `packages[].pre_build_scripts` | no | array<string> |  | Alias for pre-build-scripts. |
| `packages[].pre_build_scripts[]` | yes | string |  |  |
